stemHtml: You and your friend are both pilots for the same operator. You notice a change to their behaviour when they are designated as commander and you as their co-pilot. This is because...

options.a: They are attempting to apply the principles of persuasion to the rest of the crew.
options.b: of the risky effect of group decision-making.
options.c: they are attempting to promote non-conformity in the group.
options.d: of the social expectations of being flight crew.
